name: Mahmoud Khairy
title: Automation & AI QA Lead | Architecting Scalable AI-Driven Test Frameworks | Staff Automation Engineer
summary: Staff Automation & AI Engineer with deep expertise in web, mobile, DB, and API automation. Creator of the Quality Mate platform and experienced in building AI-driven testing solutions such as self-healing scripts, intelligent test case generation, and predictive analytics. Passionate about driving innovation, enhancing team collaboration, and scaling automation maturity to deliver high-quality software and measurable business value. Awarded Employee of the Year (2024) within the Quality Team.
